system: Eden Skye Studios Content Creator Agent

homepage.hero_subheadline: A black-card AI model studio for cinematic avatars, luxury digital talent, immersive closet experiences, and always-on content creation.
homepage.model_discovery_copy: Meet a curated roster of AI models built for premium campaigns, visual storytelling, video experiences, and brand-safe content systems.
homepage.black_card_cta: Unlock priority access, private model drops, advanced AI experiences, and concierge-level creative workflows inside Eden Skye Black Card.
homepage.closet_cta: Step into Eden's Closet: a cinematic wardrobe and environment selector built for visual storytelling, outfit exploration, and content-ready looks.
homepage.ai_chat_video_cta: Chat, brief, style, and direct the Eden Skye universe through guided AI conversations and video-ready avatar workflows.

models.grid_intro: Browse the Eden Skye roster: editorial AI talent designed for campaigns, product stories, social content, video scripts, and immersive brand worlds.
models.profile_bio_template: [Model Name] is an Eden Skye digital model built for premium visual campaigns, cinematic content, and controlled brand-safe storytelling. Their look is designed for luxury editorials, Shopify/Xyla draft concepts, social campaign testing, and AI video packet development.
models.work_with_model_panel: Create a campaign brief, request a look variation, generate a Shopify/Xyla draft, or prepare a video packet for approval. All live usage remains gated until reviewed.
models.black_card_upsell: Black Card members receive priority model concepts, enhanced creative packets, private visual batches, and expanded content workflow access.

closet.headline: Eden's Closet
closet.subheadline: A dark luxury wardrobe environment where outfits, rooms, poses, and content-ready looks are staged before approval.
closet.environment_copy: Choose the scene before the story: walk-in closet, penthouse, rooftop, beach villa, luxury hotel, photo studio, or private bedroom set.
closet.wardrobe_prompt: Select a look, mark favorites, and route approved combinations into content, Shopify draft, or video packet review.

shopify_xyla.black_card_product_description: Eden Skye Black Card is the private access layer for premium AI model experiences, priority creative workflows, advanced visual packets, and concierge-style content direction. Built for creators, operators, and brands that want controlled access to Eden Skye's AI model ecosystem before public release.
shopify_xyla.collection_copy: Explore AI model experiences, visual content systems, wardrobe-led campaigns, and Black Card access products drafted for review inside Eden Skye Studios.
shopify_xyla.model_service_draft: Book a draft creative packet with an Eden Skye model: profile imagery, campaign copy, social concepts, Shopify/Xyla product draft copy, and video script direction. Final publishing and live commerce activation require approval.
shopify_xyla.protected_note: Draft only. No live Shopify product activation or payment flow is approved by this content batch.

social.launch_caption: The studio is opening in black neon. Eden Skye Studios brings AI models, cinematic content, digital fashion, and Black Card access into one controlled creative system. Draft preview only.
social.model_reveal_caption: Meet the next Eden Skye model: built for premium campaigns, visual storytelling, social drafts, and video-ready creative packets. Approved internal source, pending final channel approval.
social.closet_teaser: Eden's Closet is where the look gets chosen before the story begins. Wardrobe, environment, viewer controls, and content-ready direction in one dark luxury space.
social.black_card_cta: Black Card is the private layer: priority model access, creative packet workflows, and premium Eden Skye experiences. Draft access only until activation approval.
social.short_video_script: Open on black neon studio. Cut to model portrait. Cut to Closet environment. Voiceover: This is Eden Skye Studios, where AI models, wardrobe systems, and cinematic content workflows move through one approval-controlled creative engine. End card: Black Card access coming next.

heygen_video.avatar_intro_script: Welcome to Eden Skye Studios. I'm Eden, your guide inside the studio. Here, every model, look, video packet, and content draft moves through a controlled approval system before it goes live.
heygen_video.black_card_concierge_script: Black Card gives you priority access to the Eden Skye creative engine: model concepts, visual batches, private content workflows, and premium AI experiences. Live activation remains approval-gated.
heygen_video.closet_walkthrough_script: Inside Eden's Closet, you can choose the model view, wardrobe category, environment, lighting direction, and content use case. Save the combination as a draft, then route it for approval.
heygen_video.checkout_explainer_script: This checkout experience is currently draft-safe. Black Card payment activation is locked until final approval. You can review the offer, test the flow, and validate entitlement logic before going live.

protected_action_warning: This content batch is not approved for public publishing, live Shopify activation, final HeyGen use, production deploy, or social posting.
next_safe_action: Review in Eden Media Approval Studio, then promote selected copy to approved_site_draft, approved_shopify_draft, approved_social_draft, or approved_heygen_packet.
